title: zornia lasiocarpa
intro: Zornia lasiocarpa, also known as the hairy buttonweed, is a perennial herb belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Zornia lasiocarpa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a useful remedy for wound healing and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
